prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年大连理工大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5198名→4877名→4260名→3676名→4096名。2021至2024年呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），2024年达到近年最高点3676名；2025年出现明显回落，较2024年后移约420名，回到约4096名，为近三年次低点。近5年位次波动幅度约1522名，整体呈"先升后降"走势；该校在上海市综合类招生计划持续缩减：2021年12人→2022年8人→2023年8人→2024年7人→2025年5人→2026年4人。2026年较2025年再减1人，缩招20%，连续第5年减少招生名额。招生计划持续收紧对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第28位、2022年第31位、2023年第32位、2024年第28位、2025年第28位、2026年第28位，近年稳定在全国第28名左右，属于国内顶尖理工类高校，"四大工学院"之一；声誉评价方面，2024年有投档线异常传闻（"投档线降至420分"等不实信息），2026年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及录取断档传闻），但事件数量有限。抖音热度总排名第55位，评价为"较热"，综合热度约56万，在985高校中处于中等偏下水平，短视频平台关注度一般。历史投档异常记录显示2023年有电信学部断档传闻，但属个别学部现象；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），力学、土木工程、机械工程、工商管理、管理科学与工程、软件工程获评A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程获评A-，共10个A-及以上学科。化学工程与技术、机械工程、软件工程等王牌学科与该校在上海市招生的"人工智能""计算机科学与技术"等专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年计算机类，电子信息/通信=76.86），人工智能专业呈谨慎观望态势。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年约49276人增加约35%，竞争基数显著扩大。；大连理工大学位于辽宁省大连市，非上海本地高校，上海考生报考需跨省就读。该校在上海市招生规模极小（2026年仅4人），属于该校全国招生中的极小份额，地域偏好对报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回落至4096名的基准、2026年招生计划再缩招20%、上海市考生总数暴增约35%导致竞争加剧，以及学校声誉偏负面、抖音热度一般等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年有所前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低录取位次约3804名，波动区间3304–4304名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 大连理工大学2026年在上海市综合类仅招2个专业共4人，招生规模极小。位次在预测区间3304–4304名内，建议以二档计算机科学与技术为主攻方向，一档人工智能（新工科大师班）作为冲刺目标。由于招生人数极少，报考风险较高，建议结合自身位次与兴趣慎重决策。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Dalian University of Technology in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 5198 → 4877 → 4260 → 3676 → 4096. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreased, competition intensified), reaching the highest point in 2024 at 3676; in 2025, there was a significant decline, moving back about 420 places compared to 2024, returning to approximately 4096, the second lowest point in the past three years. The ranking fluctuation over the past five years is about 1522 places, showing an overall "rise then fall" trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai's comprehensive category has been continuously shrinking: 2021: 12 students → 2022: 8 → 2023: 8 → 2024: 7 → 2025: 5 → 2026: 4. In 2026, it decreased by another 1 student compared to 2025, a 20% reduction, marking the fifth consecutive year of decreasing enrollment quotas. The continuous tightening of enrollment plans has a significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, it ranked 28th in 2021, 31st in 2022, 32nd in 2023, 28th in 2024, 28th in 2025, and 28th in 2026, stabilizing around 28th nationally in recent years. It is a top-tier science and engineering university in China, one of the "Four Major Engineering Institutes." In terms of reputation evaluation, there were rumors of abnormal admission score lines in 2024 (unverified information such as "admission score line dropped to 420 points"), and the reputation evaluation in 2026 was somewhat negative (involving rumors of admission gaps), but the number of incidents is limited. Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 55th overall, rated as "relatively hot," with a comprehensive popularity of about 560,000, placing it at a medium-to-low level among 985 universities, with average attention on short video platforms. Historical records of abnormal admission show rumors of a gap in the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering in 2023, but this was an isolated phenomenon. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+ (top nationally), Mechanics, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A, and Control Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering were rated A-, totaling 10 disciplines rated A- or above. Top disciplines such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and Software Engineering are highly correlated with the majors recruited in Shanghai, such as "Artificial Intelligence" and "Computer Science and Technology."

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (in 2024, Computer Science and Electronic Information/Communications = 76.86), while the Artificial Intelligence major is viewed with cautious optimism. The total number of Shanghai Gaokao candidates in 2026 is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to approximately 49,276 in 2025, significantly expanding the competitive base. Dalian University of Technology is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, not a local Shanghai university, so Shanghai candidates need to study across provinces. The university's enrollment scale in Shanghai is extremely small (only 4 students in 2026), representing a very small share of its national enrollment, and geographical preferences have limited impact on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the 2025 ranking falling back to 4096, the 2026 enrollment plan shrinking by another 20%, the total number of Shanghai candidates surging by about 35% leading to intensified competition, as well as the university's somewhat negative reputation and average Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 3804, with a fluctuation range of 3304–4304.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class) (Free choice of all science and engineering majors in the university).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
No other recruitment majors at present.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology will recruit only 2 majors with a total of 4 students in Shanghai's comprehensive category, an extremely small enrollment scale. For rankings within the predicted range of 3304–4304, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Computer Science and Technology as the main target, with Tier 1 Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class) as a stretch goal. Due to the very small number of students, the application risk is high, so it is advisable to make a careful decision based on your own ranking and interests.
